final:
// // This module implements a 2-to-1 multiplexer where the output f selects between i0 and i1 based on the inverted state of the select line sel.
module top_module(input sel,i0,i1,output f);assign f=(sel==1'b0)?i0:i1;endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 2-to-1 multiplexer where the output f selects between i0 and i1 based on the inverted state of the select line sel.
